title: 6-Figure Fitness Business Blueprint
description: Complete step-by-step system for building a six-figure coaching business. Includes pricing strategies, client acquisition, retention systems, and scaling playbook.

title: Pinterest Viral Pin Formula
description: Proven formula for creating pins that go viral on Pinterest. Includes design principles, copy templates, psychological triggers, and A/B testing framework.

title: Email Sequences That Convert
description: 5-email sequence framework that converts free subscribers into paying customers. Templates, psychology breakdowns, timing strategies, and case studies included.

title: AI Content Repurposing System
description: Turn one piece of content into 20+ variations for different platforms. AI prompts for Twitter, LinkedIn, TikTok, Instagram, blogs, and email. Complete workflow.

title: Product Photography Prompts Bundle
description: 40+ Midjourney and DALL-E prompts for professional product photography. Includes angles, lighting, backgrounds, lifestyle shots, and mockup variations.

title: YouTube Shorts Script Generator
description: Framework for writing YouTube Shorts scripts that stop scrolls and drive views. Proven hook formulas, pacing structures, CTAs, and examples for multiple niches.

title: DM Sales Copywriting Formulas
description: 4 proven copywriting formulas for selling via DMs. Works for coaches, consultants, and digital products. Complete sequences, objection handlers, and conversion trackers.

title: Lead Magnet Creation System
description: Complete system for creating high-converting lead magnets. PDF, checklist, challenge, course, and toolkit templates. Plus email capture optimization framework.

title: Personal Brand Content Calendar
description: 90-day content calendar framework for building personal brand. Pre-written posts, posting schedule, platform strategies, and content themes for coaches and creators.
